tuv.seg: 呂氏曰：「首章之末云『子之不淑，云如之何』，責之也；二章之末云『胡然而天也，胡然而帝也』，問之也；三章之末云『展如之人兮，邦之媛也』，惜之也。辭益惋而意益深矣。」

How rich and splendid Is her pheasant-figured ​robe! Her black hair in masses like clouds, No false locks does she descend to. There are her earplugs of jade, Her comb-pin of ivory, And her high forehead, so white. She appears like a visitant from heaven! She appears like a goddess.
